name: linear
description: Search, create, and manage Linear issues and projects

envVars.name: LINEAR_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Linear OAuth Client ID (from your OAuth application)

tools.name: Search Issues
tools.description: Search for Linear issues by title or description

endpoint.query: query($query: String!, $first: Int) { issueSearch(query: $query, first: $first) { nodes { id identifier title description state { name } assignee { name } priority priorityLabel createdAt updatedAt } } }

tools.name: Get Issue
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific Linear issue

endpoint.query: query($id: String!) { issue(id: $id) { id identifier title description state { name } assignee { name email } priority priorityLabel team { name } project { name } labels { nodes { name } } comments { nodes { body user { name } createdAt } } createdAt updatedAt } }

tools.name: Create Issue
tools.description: Create a new Linear issue in a team

endpoint.query: mutation($teamId: String!, $title: String!, $description: String, $priority: Int) { issueCreate(input: { teamId: $teamId, title: $title, description: $description, priority: $priority }) { success issue { id identifier title url } } }

tools.name: Update Issue
tools.description: Update the status, assignee, or other properties of an issue

endpoint.query: mutation($id: String!, $stateId: String, $assigneeId: String, $priority: Int) { issueUpdate(id: $id, input: { stateId: $stateId, assigneeId: $assigneeId, priority: $priority }) { success issue { id identifier title state { name } assignee { name } } } }

tools.name: List Projects
tools.description: List all projects in the workspace

endpoint.query: query($first: Int) { projects(first: $first) { nodes { id name description state startDate targetDate lead { name } teams { nodes { name } } } } }

prompts.title: Find my issues
prompts.prompt: Search for Linear issues assigned to me or related to a specific topic.

prompts.title: Create bug report
prompts.prompt: Create a new bug report in Linear with title, description, and relevant labels.

prompts.title: Update issue status
prompts.prompt: Update the status of a Linear issue (e.g., mark as done, in progress, blocked).

prompts.title: Project overview
prompts.prompt: Get an overview of all projects in Linear, including their status and key issues.
